title: New Frontier
summary:
Main
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-04-08 121244.png | assets/2024-04-08_new-frontier_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_584dd3a04cbc.png
Much of the focus over the past few years has been on the impressive ramp up of oil production in Guyana where production is on track to rise to 800kbd next year from zero in 2019. Yet in the years ahead, new frontiers in the oil market could emerge and one such region with potential is Namibia. The South West African country sits between oil rich Angola and oil poor South Africa, highlighting its hydrocarbon potential or lack of.
